narrative:
Athens South (precinct in Athens County) has 1,210 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 37.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 24.2 percentage points.
